title: PortableNote Document Definition
description: An optional view over the block heap. Ordered composition of named blocks with two levels of hierarchy (sections and subsections).

root.description: Root block UUID. Block's name is the document title. Renders as h1.

sections.description: Ordered top-level sections. Each section is a block rendering at h2.

block.description: Section block UUID. Must exist in heap. Renders at h2.

subsections.description: Ordered subsection blocks. Each renders at h3. Max one level deep.

block.description: Subsection block UUID. Must exist in heap. Renders at h3.
